namespace EnchantedForest.Introduction

/-
The *identity bird* `I` is a bird that, when called, responds with the name of the bird that called it.

-/

-- the definition of the identity bird
noncomputable abbrev I : Bird := sorry

/-
A bird `A` is called *egocentric* if its response to any other bird `x` is itself.
In other words, `A` is egocentric if `‚ąÄ x, A ‚óĀ x = A`.
-/

-- the definition of an egocentric bird
noncomputable abbrev is_egocentric (A : Bird) := sorry

/-
A bird `A` is called *fond* of another bird `B` if `A`'s response to `B` is `B`.
In other words, `A` is fond of `B` if `A ‚óĀ B = B`.
-/

-- the definition of a fond bird
noncomputable abbrev is_fond_of (A B : Bird) := sorry

/-
A bird `A` is called *fixated* on another bird `B` if `A`'s response to any other bird `x` is `B`.
In other words, `A` is fixated on `B` if `‚ąÄ x, A ‚óĀ x = B`.
-/

-- the definition of a fixated bird
noncomputable abbrev is_fixated_on (A B : Bird) := sorry

/-
A bird `A` is called *hopelessly egocentric* if it is egocentric and also fond of itself.

-- the definition of a hopelessly egocentric bird
